naive_cost: Run the full Formal Conjectures repository build after every metadata edit, traversing thousands of unrelated modules.
opportunities_considered: Build only the disambiguated numeric module target.
Reuse the pinned manifest-identical dependency cache and existing transitive OLean files.
Use one Lean thread under a fixed 16 GiB cap.
Fail before compilation unless the workspace and checkout candidates are byte-identical and match the repaired candidate hash.
Require a nonempty kernel artifact and hash it after the warning-fatal build.
chosen_reductions: One exact module rather than the repository; cached dependencies rather than rehydration; byte comparison and a fixed source hash as sound prefilters.
expected_throughput_gain: 8037 unrelated repository targets are excluded. The remaining dominant operation is elaboration of one source body plus import loading; the previous cold warning-fatal target took 758 seconds.
soundness_basis: The source prefilters are exact byte/hash checks. Lake invokes the pinned Lean kernel on the exact module with --wfail, and the driver requires a nonempty resulting OLean.
remains_uncompressed: The module's transitive imports still load normally. Full repository CI and maintainer semantic review remain independent external gates.
